steps.title: Identify initial members and daily increase
steps.content: We start with the initial number of members on the first day: \$90$. Each day after that, \$10$ new members join, so the growth rate is \$10$ members per day. The total after $d$ days is therefore $$M = 90 + 10d.$$

steps.title: Compute members after 4 days
steps.content: Substitute $d = 4$ into the formula: $$M = 90 + 10 \times 4 = 90 + 40 = 130.$$ That matches choice B — B is correct.
